channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 54/100 (building)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 54/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Deeply ambivalent about any value in this policy. But what gives me pause is that the most internet-poisoned human being, Taylor Lorenz, is incredibly against this. Tweeting from her vivarium.
Parents force Starmer ...
item.description:
Deeply ambivalent about any value in this policy. But what gives me pause is that the most internet-poisoned human being, Taylor Lorenz, is incredibly against this. Tweeting from her vivarium.
Parents force Starmer ...

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Good that Burnham is recognising that the fiscal rules for investment have *already* been loosened by Reeves and now take into account all financial assets. www.ft.com/content/dd3f...
item.description: Good that Burnham is recognising that the fiscal rules for investment have *already* been loosened by Reeves and now take into account all financial assets. www.ft.com/content/dd3f...

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: As an economist, former FT journalist and now Labour MP, l don’t think the bond markets have to fear a change of Labour leadership.
The biggest problem for gilt investors and MPs alike is inflation – & it remains our...
item.description:
As an economist, former FT journalist and now Labour MP, l don’t think the bond markets have to fear a change of Labour leadership.
The biggest problem for gilt investors and MPs alike is inflation – & it remains our...

item.title: i Politics: ‘Where’s Rachel?’: As Starmer sinks, Reeves is planning for the next PM

item.title: The Times: Andy Burnham faces questions over contracts for campaign donor - The Times
